controlSet.description: Evaluate current authority state at the point of action.
Reject decisions whose revocation data exceeds the policy freshness bound.
Require evidence of revocation observation and enforcement state across relevant execution nodes.
Quarantine downstream delegations when an upstream authority is revoked or unverifiable.
Flag exploitation indicators without asserting actor intent unless independently evidenced.

failureModes: Preserved artifact remains executable after authority diverges
Revocation is known at origin but not enforced at a relying node
Downstream delegation survives a revoked upstream authority
Replay or routing occurs inside the revocation lag window
Evidence records technical validity without current legitimacy
decisionPolicy: Execution MUST be denied, quarantined, or escalated when current authority state cannot be proven within the configured temporal assurance bounds.
